{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323181119276619AC515F3BA83FFE\"}"},"total":2},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7206630329833079564","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看到12张，我笑了。整个药房都是以钱为重，甚至还说你们这些穷鬼都不配治病。结果下两章主角要死皮赖脸亮山门跪着去这种药房上班。没医德没以病人为重。就这样的医馆主角还要死皮赖脸跪着舔。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1677924499,"group_id":"7153857822512385037","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nzent7UCJbBMjwBK5M6xd18PgWH+evl0lJzojzyavFb7","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776788850\u0026x-signature=sYCOa%2F9ZxoTl7Yne0kWtutXwoT0%3D","user_id":"1284709852644944","user_name":"一丝深深的腕力"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1284709852644944","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7153857822512385037","book_info":{"abstract":"五年病痛折磨，却是天降大任！他获得祖宗传承神农之血，又得到女神总裁的关怀，他的崛起之路，注定惊天动地！\n从此，我将成为天下第一神医！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/c8e7d3fd60336775d938040d234b43f6~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"狐大仙森","author_id":"","book_id":"7153857822512385037","book_name":"盖世狂医","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#483828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":124,\"name\":\"都市修真\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=124\u0026name=都市修真\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\
